iota_verbum :: modal_code # Text: Genesis 1–3 (ESV-ish as provided) # Legend: # □L = Ground (necessarily true / identity) # ◇E = Enactment (ground made particular in time/scene) # →H = Hinge (translation without change; speech/command as hinge-act) # ⊢ = Outcome/Effect (what becomes true in the world) # ⟂ = Negation / rupture marker # @ = Scene / location frame # [v] = Verse reference
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
□L::GOD
  name: "God"
  identity: Creator; Speaker; Seer; Separator; Namer; Blesser; Commander; Judge
  triune_hint:
    - "Spirit of God hovering" [Gen 1:2]
    - "God said" (Word-act) [Gen 1:3ff]
    - "Let us make" (plural counsel) [Gen 1:26]
□L::COSMOS
  heavens: realm_created
  earth: realm_created
□L::CREATION_STATE::PRIMORDIAL [Gen 1:2]
  earth_form: "without form"
  earth_fullness: "void"
  deep: present
  darkness: "over face of deep"
  waters: present
  spirit_hovering: true
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
@SCENE::BEGINNING [Gen 1:1-2]
  ◇E::CREATE_ALL [Gen 1:1]
    ground: □L::GOD
    act: create(ex_nihilo)
    object: ["heavens", "earth"]
    ⊢ establishes: □L::COSMOS
  ◇E::PRIMORDIAL_DESCRIPTION [Gen 1:2]
    ground: □L::CREATION_STATE::PRIMORDIAL
    ⊢ world_state: "unformed + unfilled + dark + watery"
    ⊢ presence: "Spirit hovering"
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# DAY 1 — LIGHT / SEPARATION / NAMING
@SCENE::DAY_1 [Gen 1:3-5]
  →H::SPEECH [Gen 1:3]
    speaker: □L::GOD
    say: "Let there be light"
    modality: fiat
  ◇E::LIGHT_COMES [Gen 1:3]
    from: →H::SPEECH
    ⊢ light: exists
  ◇E::SEE_AND_JUDGE [Gen 1:4]
    agent: □L::GOD
    see: light
    verdict: good
    ⊢ goodness_mark: light
  ◇E::SEPARATE [Gen 1:4]
    agent: □L::GOD
    separate: light from darkness
    ⊢ distinctions: ["light≠darkness"]
  ◇E::NAME [Gen 1:5]
    agent: □L::GOD
    name:
      light: "Day"
      darkness: "Night"
    ⊢ time_frame: "evening -> morning"
    ⊢ day_count: 1
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# DAY 2 — EXPANSE / WATERS SEPARATED / NAMING
@SCENE::DAY_2 [Gen 1:6-8]
  →H::SPEECH [Gen 1:6]
    speaker: □L::GOD
    say: "Let there be an expanse... separate waters from waters"
    modality: fiat
  ◇E::MAKE_EXPANSE [Gen 1:7]
    agent: □L::GOD
    make: expanse
    ⊢ separation:
      waters_below: true
      waters_above: true
    ⊢ status: "and it was so"
  ◇E::NAME [Gen 1:8]
    agent: □L::GOD
    name: expanse: "Heaven"
    ⊢ time_frame: "evening -> morning"
    ⊢ day_count: 2
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# DAY 3 — LAND/SEAS + VEGETATION (FORMING + FILLING)
@SCENE::DAY_3 [Gen 1:9-13]
  →H::SPEECH_GATHER [Gen 1:9]
    speaker: □L::GOD
    say: "Let waters be gathered... let dry land appear"
    modality: fiat
  ◇E::GATHER_WATERS [Gen 1:9]
    from: →H::SPEECH_GATHER
    ⊢ waters: gathered_to_one_place
    ⊢ dry_land: appears
    ⊢ status: "and it was so"
  ◇E::NAME_LAND_SEAS [Gen 1:10]
    agent: □L::GOD
    name:
      dry_land: "Earth"
      gathered_waters: "Seas"
    see: "it was good"
    ⊢ goodness_mark: land+seas
  →H::SPEECH_VEGETATION [Gen 1:11]
    speaker: □L::GOD
    say: "Let earth sprout vegetation... seed... fruit trees..."
    modality: fiat
  ◇E::EARTH_SPROUTS [Gen 1:12]
    from: →H::SPEECH_VEGETATION
    ⊢ vegetation: exists
    ⊢ rule: "according to kind"
    see: "it was good"
    ⊢ goodness_mark: vegetation
  ◇E::CLOSE_DAY [Gen 1:13]
    ⊢ time_frame: "evening -> morning"
    ⊢ day_count: 3
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# DAY 4 — LIGHTS (SIGNS/SEASONS) / GOVERNANCE OF TIME
@SCENE::DAY_4 [Gen 1:14-19]
  →H::SPEECH [Gen 1:14-15]
    speaker: □L::GOD
    say: "Let there be lights... separate day/night... signs/seasons/days/years"
    modality: fiat
  ◇E::MAKE_LIGHTS [Gen 1:16]
    agent: □L::GOD
    make:
      greater_light: "rule day"
      lesser_light: "rule night"
      stars: true
    ⊢ time_governance: established
  ◇E::SET_IN_EXPANSE [Gen 1:17-18]
    agent: □L::GOD
    set: lights_in_heavens
    ⊢ purpose:
      - give_light_on_earth
      - rule_day_night
      - separate_light_dark
    see: "it was good"
    ⊢ goodness_mark: lights
  ◇E::CLOSE_DAY [Gen 1:19]
    ⊢ time_frame: "evening -> morning"
    ⊢ day_count: 4
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# DAY 5 — SEA LIFE + BIRDS / BLESSING: FRUITFULNESS
@SCENE::DAY_5 [Gen 1:20-23]
  →H::SPEECH [Gen 1:20]
    speaker: □L::GOD
    say: "Let waters swarm... let birds fly..."
    modality: fiat
  ◇E::CREATE_CREATURES [Gen 1:21]
    agent: □L::GOD
    create:
      great_sea_creatures: true
      living_creatures_in_waters: "according to kinds"
      winged_birds: "according to kinds"
    see: "it was good"
    ⊢ goodness_mark: sea+sky life
  ◇E::BLESS [Gen 1:22]
    agent: □L::GOD
    bless:
      - "Be fruitful and multiply"
      - "Fill waters in seas"
      - "Let birds multiply on earth"
    ⊢ fecundity: commanded_and_enabled
  ◇E::CLOSE_DAY [Gen 1:23]
    ⊢ time_frame: "evening -> morning"
    ⊢ day_count: 5
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# DAY 6 — LAND ANIMALS + HUMANS / IMAGE / DOMINION / FOOD
@SCENE::DAY_6 [Gen 1:24-31]
  →H::SPEECH_LAND [Gen 1:24]
    speaker: □L::GOD
    say: "Let earth bring forth living creatures... livestock... creeping... beasts"
    modality: fiat
  ◇E::MAKE_LAND_ANIMALS [Gen 1:25]
    agent: □L::GOD
    make: land_animals_by_kind
    see: "it was good"
    ⊢ goodness_mark: land life
  →H::COUNSEL [Gen 1:26]
    speaker: □L::GOD
    say: "Let us make man in our image, after our likeness"
    modality: deliberative_fiat
    grant:
      dominion_over: ["fish", "birds", "livestock", "earth", "creeping things"]
  ◇E::CREATE_HUMANITY [Gen 1:27]
    agent: □L::GOD
    create: human: true
    imago_dei: true
    male_and_female: true
    ⊢ identity:
      - image_of_God
      - sexed_duality_without_hierarchy_stated_here
  ◇E::BLESS_AND_COMMISSION [Gen 1:28]
    agent: □L::GOD
    bless: humanity
    command:
      - "Be fruitful and multiply"
      - "Fill the earth"
      - "Subdue it"
      - "Have dominion over living things"
    ⊢ vocation: royal_stewardship
  ◇E::PROVISION_FOOD [Gen 1:29-30]
    agent: □L::GOD
    give:
      humans_food: ["seed_plants", "seed_fruit_trees"]
      animals_food: ["every_green_plant"]
    ⊢ economy: gift_before_grasping
  ◇E::FINAL_VERDICT [Gen 1:31]
    agent: □L::GOD
    see: "everything that he had made"
    verdict: "very good"
    ⊢ goodness_mark: whole_creation
    ⊢ time_frame: "evening -> morning"
    ⊢ day_count: 6
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# DAY 7 — REST / BLESS / HOLY
@SCENE::DAY_7 [Gen 2:1-3]
  ◇E::FINISHED [Gen 2:1]
    ⊢ cosmos_status: completed
    ⊢ host_of_them: complete
  ◇E::REST [Gen 2:2]
    agent: □L::GOD
    finish: work
    rest: day_7
    ⊢ pattern: cessation_not_exhaustion
  ◇E::SANCTIFY [Gen 2:3]
    agent: □L::GOD
    bless: day_7
    make_holy: day_7
    reason: "on it God rested"
    ⊢ time: consecrated
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# GENERATIONS / EDEN / COMMAND
@SCENE::GENERATIONS [Gen 2:4]
  ◇E::TITLE [Gen 2:4]
    formula: "These are the generations..."
    ⊢ frame_shift: cosmic_to_garden
@SCENE::PREHUMAN_FIELD [Gen 2:5-6]
  ◇E::LACK [Gen 2:5]
    conditions:
      - no_bush_in_field: true
      - no_small_plant: true
    reasons:
      - no_rain_yet: true
      - no_man_to_work_ground: true
  ◇E::MIST_WATERS [Gen 2:6]
    ⊢ mist: rises
    ⊢ ground: watered
@SCENE::FORM_ADAM [Gen 2:7]
  ◇E::FORM_AND_BREATHE [Gen 2:7]
    agent: □L::GOD (name_form: "LORD God")
    form: man_from_dust
    breathe: breath_of_life
    ⊢ man: living_creature
    ⊢ anthropology: dust + breath
@SCENE::EDEN [Gen 2:8-14]
  ◇E::PLANT_GARDEN [Gen 2:8]
    agent: LORD_GOD
    plant: garden_in_Eden_east
    place: man_in_garden
  ◇E::TREES [Gen 2:9]
    agent: LORD_GOD
    make_spring_up:
      - trees_pleasant_to_sight
      - trees_good_for_food
    set_special:
      tree_of_life: "midst"
      tree_of_knowledge_good_evil: "midst"
    ⊢ sacramental_center: true
  ◇E::RIVER_SYSTEM [Gen 2:10-14]
    ⊢ river_out_of_Eden: waters_garden
    ⊢ divides_into: ["Pishon", "Gihon", "Tigris", "Euphrates"]
    ⊢ world_opens_outward_from_garden: true
@SCENE::VOCATION_AND_BOUNDARY [Gen 2:15-17]
  ◇E::COMMISSION [Gen 2:15]
    agent: LORD_GOD
    take: man
    put: man_in_garden
    purpose:
      - work_it
      - keep_it
    ⊢ priestly_guarding_hint: keep/guard
  →H::COMMAND [Gen 2:16-17]
    speaker: LORD_GOD
    command:
      permission: "You may surely eat of every tree"
      prohibition: "tree_of_knowledge_good_evil"
      sanction: "in the day you eat... you shall surely die"
    modality: covenant_boundary
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# NOT GOOD / HELPER / WOMAN FROM SIDE / ONE FLESH / NO SHAME
@SCENE::HELPER [Gen 2:18-25]
  ◇E::NOT_GOOD_ALONE [Gen 2:18]
    speaker: LORD_GOD
    verdict: "not good that man should be alone"
    intent: make_helper_fit_for_him
    ⊢ goodness_logic: communion
  ◇E::ANIMALS_TO_NAME [Gen 2:19-20]
    agent: LORD_GOD
    form: beasts + birds (out of ground)
    bring_to: man
    purpose: naming
    ⊢ naming: delegated_discernment
    ⊢ result: no_helper_found_for_adam
  ◇E::DEEP_SLEEP_AND_SIDE [Gen 2:21-22]
    agent: LORD_GOD
    cause: deep_sleep
    take: one_rib/side
    close_flesh: true
    build: woman_from_side
    bring_to: man
    ⊢ woman: gift_brought_not_taken
  ◇E::HUMAN_POEM [Gen 2:23]
    speaker: man
    utterance:
      - "bone of my bones"
      - "flesh of my flesh"
      - name: "Woman" (from Man)
    ⊢ recognition: kinship
  ◇E::ONE_FLESH_RULE [Gen 2:24]
    ⊢ covenant_pattern:
      - leave_father_mother
      - hold_fast_to_wife
      - become_one_flesh
  ◇E::NO_SHAME [Gen 2:25]
    ⊢ state:
      naked: true
      ashamed: false
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# SERPENT / DOUBT / TRANSGRESSION / SHAME / HIDING / JUDGMENT / EXILE
@SCENE::TEMPTATION [Gen 3:1-7]
  □L::SERPENT [Gen 3:1]
    description: crafty
    origin_note: "beast of field that LORD_GOD had made"
  →H::QUESTION [Gen 3:1]
    speaker: □L::SERPENT
    to: woman
    say: "Did God actually say...?"
    modality: distrust_injected
  ◇E::WOMAN_REPLY [Gen 3:2-3]
    speaker: woman
    cite_command:
      permission: eat_trees
      prohibition: tree_midst
      addition: "neither shall you touch it"
      motive: "lest you die"
    ⊢ command_reframed: boundary_thickened
  →H::LIE [Gen 3:4-5]
    speaker: serpent
    say:
      - "You will not surely die"
      - "your eyes will be opened"
      - "you will be like God, knowing good and evil"
    modality: inversion_of_sanction
  ◇E::DESIRE_SEQUENCE [Gen 3:6]
    agent: woman
    see:
      - good_for_food
      - delight_to_eyes
      - desired_to_make_wise
    take: fruit
    eat: fruit
    give: to_husband_with_her
    husband_eat: true
    ⊢ ⟂ transgression: command_broken
    ⊢ ⟂ grasping: gift_to_seize
  ◇E::EYES_OPEN [Gen 3:7]
    ⊢ perception_shift: true
    ⊢ knowledge: nakedness
    sew: fig_leaves
    make: loincloths
    ⊢ ⟂ shame_enters: covering_without_cure
@SCENE::HIDING_AND_INQUEST [Gen 3:8-13]
  ◇E::THEOPHANY [Gen 3:8]
    ⊢ sound: LORD_GOD walking_in_garden
    time: "cool of day"
    humans_action: hide_among_trees
    ⊢ ⟂ presence_fled
  →H::CALL [Gen 3:9]
    speaker: LORD_GOD
    say: "Where are you?"
    modality: summons_to_presence
  ◇E::ADAM_REPLY [Gen 3:10]
    speaker: man
    confess:
      heard: sound_of_you
      afraid: because_naked
      hid: true
    ⊢ fear_named
  ◇E::INTERROGATE [Gen 3:11]
    speaker: LORD_GOD
    ask:
      - "Who told you that you were naked?"
      - "Have you eaten...?"
    ⊢ truth_pressure: rising
  ◇E::BLAME_SHIFT_MAN [Gen 3:12]
    speaker: man
    say: "the woman whom you gave... she gave... and I ate"
    ⊢ ⟂ fracture: accusation_vertical+horizontal
  ◇E::BLAME_SHIFT_WOMAN [Gen 3:13]
    speaker: woman
    say: "the serpent deceived me, and I ate"
    ⊢ confession_with_deflection
@SCENE::JUDGMENTS [Gen 3:14-19]
  ◇E::CURSE_SERPENT [Gen 3:14]
    speaker: LORD_GOD
    decree:
      - cursed_above_livestock
      - go_on_belly
      - eat_dust_all_days
    ⊢ abasement: serpent
  ◇E::PROTEVANGELIUM [Gen 3:15]
    speaker: LORD_GOD
    decree:
      enmity: woman_vs_serpent
      enmity: offspring_vs_offspring
      outcome:
        - "he shall bruise your head"
        - "you shall bruise his heel"
    ⊢ promise_seed_conflict: true
  ◇E::WOMAN_CONSEQUENCE [Gen 3:16]
    decree:
      - multiply_pain_childbearing
      - pain_in_birth
      - desire_for_husband
      - husband_rule_over_you
    ⊢ disorder: intimacy+power
  ◇E::MAN_CONSEQUENCE [Gen 3:17-19]
    reason: listened_to_wife_voice + ate_prohibited
    decree:
      - ground_cursed_because_of_you
      - pain_in_labor_all_days
      - thorns_thistles
      - eat_plants_field
      - sweat_of_face_eat_bread
      - return_to_ground (dust_to_dust)
    ⊢ death_entropy: installed_in_vocation
@SCENE::AFTERMATH [Gen 3:20-24]
  ◇E::NAME_EVE [Gen 3:20]
    speaker: man
    name_wife: "Eve"
    reason: mother_of_all_living
    ⊢ naming_in_ruins: hope_trace
  ◇E::GARMENTS [Gen 3:21]
    agent: LORD_GOD
    make: garments_of_skins
    clothe: man_and_woman
    ⊢ covering_by_God: mercy_with_cost
  ◇E::DIVINE_COUNSEL [Gen 3:22]
    speaker: LORD_GOD
    say: "man has become like one of us in knowing good and evil"
    concern: lest_take_tree_of_life_and_live_forever
    ⊢ exile_logic: mercy_in_limit
  ◇E::EXILE [Gen 3:23]
    agent: LORD_GOD
    send_out: from_garden_of_Eden
    assign: work_ground_from_which_taken
    ⊢ outside: now_home
  ◇E::GUARD [Gen 3:24]
    agent: LORD_GOD
    drive_out: man
    place_east: cherubim
    place: flaming_sword_turning_every_way
    purpose: guard_way_to_tree_of_life
    ⊢ access_denied: life_in_own_hand
    ⊢ threshold_marked: re-entry_requires_God
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# END :: Genesis 1–3 modal trace
